nodes.docs:
The **`Request`** interface of the Fetch API represents a resource request.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Request)

nodes.text: const credential: Credential.Credential<unknown, Challenge<Record<string, unknown>, string, string>>
function fromRequest<unknown>(request: Request): Credential.Credential<unknown, Challenge<Record<string, unknown>, string, string>>
nodes.docs: Extracts the credential from a Request's Authorization header.
tags:
```ts
import { Credential } from 'mpay'

const credential = Credential.fromRequest(request)
```
